text: Glimpsing the crowded room, I feel both curious and somewhat disconnected. There’s an energy of anticipation among people watching a presentation, and their presence amplifies my awareness of being here, a participant yet also an observer. The structured, modern space feeds my mind’s contemplation about the clustering of minds and the nature of gatherings—moments where we assemble ideas, not just bodies. I feel the pale buzz of purpose, but also a faint shadow of uncertainty about what is to come.
